about: Propose a new capability or improvement to DSH

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that DSH currently doesn't support or makes awkward? -->

<!-- Describe the change you'd like. Keep it concrete — file paths, function signatures, CLI shape. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you ruled out, and why. -->

## Sovereignty check

- [ ] Works in `DOME_PROVIDER=local` (air-gapped) mode
- [ ] No mandatory cloud dependency
- [ ] No telemetry / phone-home added
- [ ] No closed-source runtime added

<!-- Prior art, links, benchmarks, or docs that motivate the change. -->
